title: Terms of Use - WasteLess
description: Terms of Use for the WasteLess mobile app and related services.
intro: These terms govern your access to and use of WasteLess, including the mobile app, related backend services, subscriptions and content made available through the service.
footnote: If mandatory local law gives you stronger rights, that law will prevail over any conflicting term to the extent required.

sections.title: 1. Service publisher
paragraphs: WasteLess is published by Hilaire Giovanni, 925 Boulevard Rene-Levesque Est, Canada.
Support and legal contact: support.wasteless@gmail.com.

sections.title: 2. What WasteLess is
paragraphs: WasteLess is a mobile application designed to help users manage food inventory, reduce food waste, view product information, generate recipe suggestions, build shopping lists and plan meals.
Some features rely on third-party services, automated processing and in-app purchases.

sections.title: 3. Acceptance and eligibility
paragraphs: By creating an account, accessing WasteLess or using the service, you agree to these terms and to the Privacy Policy.
You must have the legal capacity required to use the service, or use it with any authorization required under the law applicable to you.

sections.title: 4. User account and security
bullets: You must provide accurate, current and complete information where required to use the service.
You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and for activity that occurs through your account.
You must promptly notify us of unauthorized access, suspected fraud or misuse involving your account.
We may require reasonable verification steps to protect the account or prevent fraud.

sections.title: 5. License to use the service
paragraphs: Subject to these terms, WasteLess grants you a limited, personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable and revocable license to use the app and related services for personal, non-commercial purposes.
bullets: This license does not transfer ownership of the app, code, trademarks, visuals, documentation or protected content.
Any use outside that license is prohibited unless we expressly authorize it.

sections.title: 6. Permitted and prohibited use
paragraphs: You agree to use WasteLess in compliance with applicable law and these terms.
bullets: You must not bypass technical protections, quotas, access controls, security mechanisms or subscription restrictions.
You must not scrape the service, extract data at scale, overload the infrastructure, run abusive bots or conduct unauthorized load testing.
You must not reverse engineer, copy, resell, sublicense or commercially exploit the service without authorization.
You must not use the service to infringe third-party rights, submit unlawful content, commit fraud or attempt unauthorized access to accounts or data.

sections.title: 7. User data and content responsibilities
paragraphs: You remain responsible for the information, lists, text, products, photos or other content that you enter, upload or transmit through WasteLess.
You agree to submit only content that you are legally entitled to use and that does not violate the rights of others.

sections.title: 8. Subscriptions, in-app purchases and payments
paragraphs: Some WasteLess features may be reserved for users with a Premium offer available through subscriptions or in-app purchases depending on the platform.
Purchases are processed by Apple App Store or Google Play. Displayed prices, currency, taxes, billing timing and payment rules are determined by the relevant store and your region.
bullets: Unless otherwise stated on the purchase screen, subscriptions renew automatically until cancelled.
You can manage, cancel or restore purchases in your Apple or Google account settings depending on your device.
Refunds, billing disputes and payment rules are handled under the policies of the relevant store.
Deleting your WasteLess account does not automatically cancel an active subscription purchased from Apple or Google.
We may technically verify purchases and receipts to confirm Premium access rights and prevent fraud.

sections.title: 9. Automated suggestions, AI and third-party content
paragraphs: Recipe suggestions, estimates and automated content made available through WasteLess, including outputs based on AI or third-party data sources, are provided for informational and convenience purposes only.
You are solely responsible for checking ingredients, allergens, quantities, temperatures, cooking times, storage conditions and whether a recommendation is suitable for your situation.
bullets: WasteLess does not provide medical advice, diagnosis or personalized nutritional guarantees.
Automated systems and third-party providers may produce errors, delays, omissions or inconsistencies.

sections.title: 10. Availability, maintenance and changes
bullets: We may modify, suspend, fix or discontinue all or part of the service for technical, legal, maintenance, security or product reasons.
We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or that the service will always be error-free.
We may add, modify or remove features, including Premium features, without any obligation to maintain older versions or interfaces indefinitely.

sections.title: 11. Intellectual property
bullets: WasteLess, including its architecture, code, design, text, illustrations, trademarks and visual elements, is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
No rights are transferred to you other than the personal use license described in these terms.
Any unauthorized reproduction, adaptation, substantial extraction or exploitation is prohibited.

sections.title: 12. Personal data
paragraphs: Personal data processing is described in the Privacy Policy, which forms part of the contractual framework applicable to your use of the service.
By using WasteLess, you acknowledge that you have read that policy.

sections.title: 13. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WasteLess is not liable for indirect, consequential or incidental damages, loss of profits, loss of data, loss of opportunity, downtime or damage arising from use of the service, a third-party service, infrastructure failure, content errors, reliance on a suggestion or events outside our reasonable control.
You use the service at your own responsibility.

sections.title: 14. Suspension, termination and account deletion
bullets: You may stop using the service at any time.
You may request deletion of your account from the app when that option is available or by contacting support.
We may suspend, restrict or terminate access in the event of serious or repeated violations of these terms, fraudulent use, security risks or legal obligations.

sections.title: 15. Governing law and disputes
paragraphs: These terms are interpreted under the laws applicable in your jurisdiction of residence and, where permitted, under Canadian law on a supplemental basis.
Before formal legal action, you agree to seek an amicable resolution by contacting us at support.wasteless@gmail.com.

sections.title: 16. Changes to these terms
paragraphs: We may update these terms to reflect changes in the service, legal obligations, payment practices, third-party providers or security requirements.
The last updated date indicates the current version. Where a material change is made, we may notify you by an appropriate method.
